name: Apify
one_liner: Cloud platform for web scraping and browser automation, running thousands of prebuilt 'Actors' (scrapers/crawlers) and storing their results, all accessible via a REST API.
access_notes: Anyone can create a free Apify account and immediately obtain a working API token from the Console (Settings > API & Integrations). No payment or human approval is required; the free plan includes monthly platform usage credit, so the API works out of the box. OAuth is also supported for integrations, and an x402/Skyfire agentic-payment path exists for accountless AI agents.
api_notes: RESTful HTTP API (api.apify.com/v2) organized around Actors (create/build/run), Tasks, Schedules, Storage (datasets, key-value stores, request queues), Webhooks, Logs, and account/integration management. 100+ endpoints, OpenAPI schema published, plus official SDK clients for Node.js, Python, Java, Rust, .NET, PHP, and Go. Global rate limit ~250k req/min.
mcp_notes: Apify ships and maintains an official MCP server: hosted Streamable HTTP endpoint at https://mcp.apify.com with OAuth, plus an open-source local stdio version (github.com/apify/apify-mcp-server). It exposes Apify Actors from the Store as tools and is compatible with Claude, Cursor, VS Code, etc.
main_blocker: None significant. Free self-serve API token; the main practical consideration is that heavy scraping consumes platform usage credits (pay-per-use / compute units), so production-scale usage requires a paid plan, but the API itself is fully usable on the free tier.

evidence.claim: The Apify API is RESTful, supports Bearer token and query-param API token auth, covers Actors/Tasks/Storage/Webhooks, and offers OpenAPI schema plus multi-language SDKs with a 250k req/min limit.
Apify provides an official, maintained MCP server hosted at mcp.apify.com (Streamable HTTP + OAuth) with an open-source local version.
API token is found on the Console API & Integrations page for authenticating API requests.
Official MCP documentation confirms hosted and local connection methods maintained by Apify.

open_questions: Exact free-tier monthly usage credit amount and whether any specific API endpoints are restricted to paid plans were not re-verified against the live pricing page in this pass.
